posts.author: code (oh)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to figure out the status of the column validation feature. I have a Pro plan and I’ve seen some people mention they’re able to use column validation rules, but according to the Monday.com documentation, this feature is currently in closed beta.

I’m a bit confused about the current availability - is this feature already rolled out to certain plans? If so, which ones? Or is it still limited to closed beta users? If it’s still in closed beta, is there a way to request access or sign up to participate in the testing?

I tried to see on the Monday’s board UI but it doesn’t seem to appear.

I’d really appreciate any clarity on this, as I’m working on some API integrations where column validation would be really useful. Thanks in advance for any help!
